metadata.seed: Yeah, I've been sleeping a lot. Going to work is a struggle. I don't really ever want to go. Just I haven't been eating much, so I think I've lost like ten pounds since past, like four months or so.

patient.query: I think it’s just a mix of everything, really. Work has been overwhelming, and I feel like I’m not good enough to keep up. Then, when I come home, it’s like I can’t shake that feeling. It just hangs around, making it hard to relax or even find joy in the little things.
